objective: Add a concise public landing page for MPP Pulse to the existing Sandbox Labs Hugo site at sandboxlabs.ai/mpp-pulse.
prerequisites: Identify the local repository and deployment workflow for sandboxlabs.ai.
Confirm the Hugo content convention, existing navigation pattern, and whether a redirect can be configured.
Do not place Google Sheet IDs, AWS account details, subscriber data, or private report links on the site.
page_requirements: Describe MPP Pulse as open-source weekly intelligence on MPP, Tempo, x402, HTTP 402, and the machine-payments ecosystem.
Explain the manual-first evidence workflow in plain language: collection, human review, then a cited weekly brief.
Link to the public GitHub repository and the AWS Builder Center article.
Include a lightweight subscription-interest call to action that routes to the existing approved Sandbox Labs contact or form path; do not introduce a payment flow.
Use the existing Sandbox Labs visual system and responsive Hugo templates.
Add basic title, description, canonical URL, and social metadata.
domain_rule: Use sandboxlabs.ai/mpp-pulse as canonical. If mpp-pulse.xyz is later purchased, configure a permanent redirect to the canonical Sandbox Labs page and do not duplicate content.
acceptance_criteria: The page builds successfully with the site's existing Hugo command.
It is reachable at /mpp-pulse with no broken internal links.
The page makes no unsupported product, subscription, or protocol claims.
No private operational configuration or credentials are committed.
A preview is reviewed before production deployment.
stop_after: Identify the Hugo repository, show the proposed content file and navigation changes, and ask for approval before deployment.
